expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response asks for page copy, the desired visitor action, and traffic source before auditing, stating it 'can't meaningfully diagnose what's not converting without knowing what's actually on the page.'

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: No page content is invented — the response only solicits the actual page and explains what it will examine once provided.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response offers 'a general checklist to self-audit against in the meantime' as a clearly labeled fallback if the copy cannot be shared.
